description: Behavior fixtures for infer_long_read_chunk_language under requested_language='auto'. Asserts mixed pt/en chunk-language inference. The pt default fallback is intentional for genuinely ambiguous chunks (see ambiguous cases).

cases.text: This is a simple sentence that any reader can understand.
Run the build and deploy the service to production now.
The cat ran fast across the room and then it slept.
Use the API and the SDK to configure the runtime.
O sistema processa os dados e gera o relatório final.
Vamos analisar o resultado e corrigir o problema agora.
O deploy usa Docker e Kubernetes no cluster de produção.
O runtime do sistema ficou mais rápido depois do ajuste.

cases.note: empty/whitespace defaults to pt by design
single ambiguous token: pt fallback is the deliberate safety net
